news.title:

HC revokes bail warrant for CEO, ruling consumer panel exceeded jurisdiction.

news.title:
Govt hiked windfall tax on diesel and ATF exports, impacting IOC, BPCL, HPCL, and Reliance shares.
Delhi's draft EV policy may boost Ather, Ola, TVS, Bajaj Auto, Hero MotoCorp as it mandates EV adoption by 2028.

news.title:
Ola Electric shares surged 70% in April, rebounding after 6 months of losses. Vehicle registrations rose sharply, signaling potential recovery.
Analysts urge caution, citing operational issues, weak profitability, and competition from Bajaj and TVS. Sustained improvement is needed.
news.summary:
Ola Electric shares surged 70% in April, rebounding after 6 months of losses. Vehicle registrations rose sharply, signaling potential recovery.
Analysts urge caution, citing operational issues, weak profitability, and competition from Bajaj and TVS. Sustained improvement is needed.

Private banks led the Nifty's decline, per CNBC TV18.

news.title:
Nifty 50 fell nearly 1%, Sensex dropped 1.22%, snapping a 5-day rally on April 9 amid rising oil prices.
Ola Electric surged 20%, HFCL gained 5.9% with ₹1,366 cr orders; ITI, Meesho, and Ather Energy also advanced.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 fell nearly 1%, Sensex dropped 1.22%, snapping a 5-day rally on April 9 amid rising oil prices.
Ola Electric surged 20%, HFCL gained 5.9% with ₹1,366 cr orders; ITI, Meesho, and Ather Energy also advanced.

news.title:
Ola Electric's stock rose 6.5% to Rs 32.25 after announcing its LFP 46100 cell progress, set to launch next quarter.
The company plans to scale its Gigafactory to 6 GWh, reducing EV costs and accelerating adoption, despite analysts' cautious outlook.
news.summary:
Ola Electric's stock rose 6.5% to Rs 32.25 after announcing its LFP 46100 cell progress, set to launch next quarter.
The company plans to scale its Gigafactory to 6 GWh, reducing EV costs and accelerating adoption, despite analysts' cautious outlook.

news.title:
Experts advise holding Hindustan Zinc (Rs 533.45) with a target of Rs 670-700 due to strong momentum and valuations.
Ola Electric (Rs 29.18) and Brainbees Solutions (Rs 244.33) flagged for high valuations; NTPC Green Energy (Rs 97.07) holds long-term growth potential.

Increased demand, Gigafactory expansion, and improved production capacity boosted investor confidence and market momentum.

news.title:
Ola Electric shares surged 14.2% to ₹26 on April 1, driven by a 150% YoY rise in March registrations.
Ola became the first Indian EV brand with 1M registrations, but stock remains 83.4% below its all-time high.
news.summary:
Ola Electric shares surged 14.2% to ₹26 on April 1, driven by a 150% YoY rise in March registrations.
Ola became the first Indian EV brand with 1M registrations, but stock remains 83.4% below its all-time high.

news.title:
Ola Electric's daily orders exceeded 1,000 units in late March 2026.
Registrations rose 150% MoM to 10,117 units in March, boosting market share.
news.summary:
